ddls:
CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_metadata" TEXT /* Metadata about the service */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service type */,
  "service_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the TAXII Services Version */,
  "protocol_binding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the TAXII Protocol Binding Version */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service */,
  "service_address" TEXT /* Network address for contacting the service */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_protocol_binding_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_binding_id") REFERENCES protocol_bindings ("protocol_binding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_service_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_version_id") REFERENCES service_versions ("service_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type */,
  "service_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "service_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_versions" (
  "service_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the TAXII Services Specification */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocol_bindings" (
  "protocol_binding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol binding */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the protocol binding */,
  "protocol_description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol binding */,
  "specification_document" TEXT /* Specification document for the protocol binding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_binding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_metadata" TEXT /* Metadata about the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status of the client */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the client registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client accessing the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was accessed */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the service */,
  "client_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the client during access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., poll, submit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_access_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_access_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data exchange event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client exchanging data */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service exchanging data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data exchanged */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  "data_compression" TEXT /* Compression method used for the data */,
  "exchange_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exchanged */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data exchanged (in MB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exchange_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exchange_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service being monitored */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., response time, data volume) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_metrics_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance standard */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the compliance standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance event */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service being monitored */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compliance standard */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance was evaluated */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used to evaluate compliance */,
  "evaluation_result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_compliance_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES compliance_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_compliance_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service that has the dependency */,
  "dependent_service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service that is depended upon */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., data, functionality) */,
  "dependency_description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_dependencies_dependent_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_dependencies_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service being updated */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., version update, configuration change) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the update (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_updates_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client that owns the API key */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service that the API key is for */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key value */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the API key expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_api_keys_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_api_keys_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_api_key_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key usage event */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the API key used */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the API key was used */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* Method used in the API request */,
  "request_path" TEXT /* Path of the API request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_api_key_usage_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES service_api_keys ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service that the documentation is for */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., API documentation, user manual) */,
  "doc_url" TEXT /* URL of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_documentation_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client that gave the rating */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service that was rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_ratings_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_ratings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
